description: Test corpus for the deserialization-security skill. The CWE-502 RCE primitive lives in a native-deserializer call no deterministic gate scanner flags, so this is a schema-driven corpus: the runner smoke-validates fixture shape, and the detect/ignore pairs double as ground truth for the LLM eval harness. detect = an untrusted byte stream handed to a native deserializer; ignore = the schema-validated / safe-loader alternative the skill mandates.

fixtures.reason: pickle.loads on request bytes is arbitrary-code-execution (CWE-502)
structural JSON parse + schema validation, no native deserializer

fixtures.text: const serialize = require('node-serialize'); app.get('/me', (req, res) => { const session = serialize.unserialize(req.cookies.session); res.json(session); });
fixtures.reason: node-serialize unserialize() executes embedded function payloads (RCE)

fixtures.text: app.get('/me', (req, res) => { const session = JSON.parse(req.cookies.session); res.json(session); });
fixtures.reason: JSON.parse cannot instantiate objects or run code
yaml.Loader constructs arbitrary Python objects from untrusted YAML
safe_load restricts construction to plain scalars/collections
